title: AntiGhost Continued
description: A mod that fixes ghost blocks in the minecraft. A continuation of anti ghost mod that made by Giselbaer.
body:
# 👻 AntiGhost Continued

Tired of **"ghost blocks"** ruining your game experience? This is the updated and maintained version of the classic AntiGhost mod!

***

## ❓ What is a Ghost Block?

Ghost blocks occur when the Minecraft client thinks a block is there, but the server knows it’s gone (or vice versa). This often happens during fast mining, fast placing, explosions, or high-latency gameplay, leading to players getting stuck or falling through "invisible" floors.

## ✨ Key Features

### ⚡ Instant Desync Fix

Quickly synchronizes blocks in a specific radius around the player to ensure what you see is actually there.

### 🧤 Simple Use

Just type `/antighost` or press  `G`  (default keybind) to refresh nearby blocks and reveal the truth!

### ⌨️ Customization

Take advantage of custom keybinds to enhance your ghost block-free **experience**.

### 🚀 Updated Support

Specifically maintained and optimized for the latest Minecraft versions (including **1.21.1**).

***

## 🛠 How to Use

*   **Command:** Enter `/antighost` in the chat.
*   **Keybind:** The default keybind for the mod is `G`. You can change this in your Minecraft controls settings.
*   **Downloading:** You need [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to use this mod

***

## 📜 Licensing & Credits

*   **Original Creator:** This mod is a continuation of the original **AntiGhost** mod. Huge thanks to the original author **Giselbaer** for the initial concept.
*   **License:** This version is distributed under a **Custom License**. Please refer to the [LICENSE](https://github.com/enflkyls/AntiGhost-Continued/blob/main/LICENSE) file in our repository for terms of use regarding modifications and redistribution.
